title: Trial style spawners
description: A retexture and ever so slight remodel of the default minecraft spawner to make it resemble the trial spawners a little closer.
body:
A remodel of the spawners to resemble the trial spawners using modified and early trial spawner textures. Made to give you slightly more clarity so you can tell whats inside by looking at the middle of the texture.


In the screenshots
1. [Pixel consistency](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-consistency)(spider model)
2. [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)(shader)
